data.body:
Running Gemma 4 31B on two MI100s (64GB HBM2) has been a wild ride.

Key findings:
• PagedAttention + mmap = sweet spot for KV cache
• vm.swappiness=10 prevents OOM
• SGLang beats vLLM by ~3.7x for conversations

The coil whine when GPUs spike is... distinctive. Sovereignty has a sound. 🏛️

#LocalLLM
